json_data.title: Paging and Segmentation
json_data.reason: This topic introduces modern non-contiguous memory allocation techniques that directly address the fragmentation and multiprogramming limitations of early schemes.

json_data.title: Advanced Virtual Memory Performance and Optimization
json_data.reason: This explores the performance implications and advanced policies of virtual memory, such as thrashing, working set models, and detailed page replacement algorithms, which are crucial for system design.

json_data.title: Memory Management for Non-Volatile Memory (NVM) and Persistent Memory (PMEM)
json_data.reason: This cutting-edge area investigates novel memory management paradigms required to effectively utilize new memory technologies that blur the traditional lines between volatile memory and persistent storage.
